sql: SELECT id, name, department FROM users WHERE department_id IN (#{deptIds}) AND status IN (#{statusList})
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, department FROM users
<where>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="deptId" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{deptId}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0">
        AND status IN
        <foreach collection="statusList" item="st" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{st}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
